official_release.timing_note: The tag is the exact release named by the paper's experiments. The arXiv v1 was submitted four days later.

linked_artifacts.task_dataset_access: auto-gated; metadata and file manifest inspected without credentials, task contents not downloaded
linked_artifacts.trajectory_access: public metadata/file manifest inspected; large trajectory archives not mirrored

inspection_scope: Read the complete 68-page immutable paper. Inspected the exact tagged public code release, release manifest, runner/setup documentation, task loader/download mechanism, evaluator library, safety modules, result schema, and public task/trajectory manifests. Official task implementations were gated and were not inferred from public examples. No cloud environment or paid model trial was run.
